top_signals.title: Iraq Tells Oil Fields to Start Lifting Output After US-Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: Iraq asked operators of five major oil fields to boost production to prewar levels, targeting output of over 3 million barrels a day, after US-Iran deal that aims to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US-Iran Delegations Expected in Switzerland
top_signals.summary: Three days after President Trump signed an agreement with Iran, Switzerland is playing host for diplomatic talks with the United States, Iran, Pakistan, and Qatar in attendance. The Associated Press's International Correspondent Philip Crowther joins Bloomberg This Weekend with hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini to discuss who may be attending this summit and what a newly established ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah could mean.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Alamos takes output hit on Young-Davidson mine disruptions
top_signals.summary: The Canadian gold miner said the mine operation experienced two seismic events last week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe'
top_signals.summary: Apple appears poised to take the rare step of increasing prices to deal with what CEO Tim Cook called an "unsustainable" memory shortage.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Goldman cuts gold price forecast down to $4,900
top_signals.summary: The bank had previously set a price target of $5,400/oz. by the end of 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Webinar: How attackers bypass MFA and how defenders can respond
top_signals.summary: Modern phishing attacks, including Device Code phishing, can undermine MFA protections and grant attackers access to corporate accounts without stealing passwords. This webinar explores how behavioral AI can help security teams detect compromised accounts faster and automate response workflows. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Panama audit boosts Cobre Panama restart hopes
top_signals.summary: Environmental review found compliance near 88% but flagged biodiversity and restoration concerns.
